title: WUJUN 105ft 300 LED Christmas Tree Lights, Christmas String Lights End-to-End Plug 8 Modes Memory Function Outdoor Indoor Fairy Lights, Garden, Party, Wedding, Holiday, Warm White
features: ✦【8 Lighting Modes Controller With Memory Function】：Our upgraded string lights with 8 different working modes: combination, in waves, sequential, slo-glo, chasing/flash, slow fade, twinkle/flash, steady on. The controller is designed to remember the last setting after cutting off the power. No need to set the light again.

✦【100% UKCA Certified & Low Voltage, Super Safe To Use】: 100% UKCA Certified for whole set including led beads, copper core insulated wire and low voltage are UKCA approved. Not get hot even after long hour use. Very safe to use.Meets standard for safety of Holiday/seasonal decorative light, much safe to use. Perfect for Christmas, halloween, Easter, weddings, party, festival, holiday decoration.

✦【300 LED 105FT Support 4 Sets End To End Connectable】：This super long 105ft fairy dark green string lights with 300 Warm White individual LED bulbs. And each Christmas light has end-to-end connection , If you buy 4 sets at the same time and connect them, you will get a Christmas String Lights which up to 420 Ft and have 1200LEDs to illuminate a wider range.They will brighten up the dark corner for happiness atmosphere inside or outside.

✦【Durable and Water Resistant】：Waterproof designed string lights perfect for both indoor and outdoor decorations. The strong construction makes it tough and sturdy, not easy to break apart and overheat after long hours of usage. They are strong enough to provide years of high quality lighting.
description: Product Description Things to know before buying： We have produced two different plug shapes (two different plug shape lighting, randomly sent by Amazon warehouse) plug shapes are different, but it will not affect the use of the lighting.
